goal: Close the OpenSearch dependency surface needed before Cortex retrieval work begins.

deliverables.title: Cross-repo service contract alignment
deliverables.summary: Align the Cortex dependency overlay with the platform-owned OpenSearch service contract and the real implementation repositories.
outputs: Aligned ownership split between Cortex overlay and platform canonical service docs.
Context pack and implementation references that point developers at the correct repos.

tasks.title: Validate service ownership split
tasks.description: Confirm which parts of the OpenSearch work belong to the platform service bundle, the Cortex dependency overlay, and the deployment repos.
outputs: Explicit ownership notes in Cortex dependency docs.

tasks.title: Align local Cortex dependency docs
tasks.description: Keep the Cortex OpenSearch overlay focused on Cortex-specific contract needs, context pack, and downstream acceptance requirements.
outputs: Updated Cortex dependency README, spec, and regression plan.

deliverables.title: Container posture and mount configuration
deliverables.summary: Update the deployed service definition so the container uses the intended RAM, CPU, storage, plugin, and backup posture.
outputs: Rendered service posture for 64 GiB memory, 4 CPU cores, no GPU requirement, dedicated NVMe data path, and backup HDD mount.
Required plugin or tooling set available in the service image.

tasks.title: Set resource allocation and JVM posture
tasks.description: Update the service definition to reflect the intended memory budget, heap sizing, CPU allocation, and no-GPU posture.
outputs: Updated compose or service template with the intended resource posture.

tasks.title: Wire data and backup mounts
tasks.description: Mount the dedicated NVMe data path and the backup HDD snapshot path, and configure path.repo for snapshot registration.
outputs: Documented manual host bootstrap step if the mount target must be prepared manually.

tasks.title: Confirm required plugins and tooling
tasks.description: Ensure the image exposes the MVP-required plugin and tooling set, including k-NN, Security, SQL, Index Management, and Performance Analyzer.
outputs: Image or runtime plugin inventory that matches the documented requirement set.

deliverables.title: Operator control plane and CLI path
deliverables.summary: Expose a clear Moltbox operator path for deploy, status, version inspection, health checks, and temporary index administration.
outputs: Documented operator command path for deploy, status, version, health, snapshot inspection, and smoke-index lifecycle.

tasks.title: Verify standard gateway lifecycle commands
tasks.description: Use the standard Moltbox service lifecycle commands as the canonical deploy and status path.
outputs: Validated deploy and status command path.

tasks.title: Define native CLI passthrough usage
tasks.description: Confirm how the operator invokes native OpenSearch inspection commands through the Moltbox control plane and capture that path for later epics.

deliverables.title: Security and backup bootstrap
deliverables.summary: Enable the Security plugin, provision initial credentials and the Cortex service account, and configure the snapshot repository and nightly policy.
outputs: Dedicated Cortex service account and role.
Registered snapshot repository and nightly policy.

tasks.title: Enable security and secret injection
tasks.description: Turn on the Security plugin and route initial credentials through the standard secret-management path.

tasks.title: Provision Cortex service account
tasks.description: Create the dedicated Cortex service account and role with the least privilege needed for Cortex bootstrap and normal read or write paths.
outputs: Authenticated Cortex service account and role.

tasks.title: Configure snapshot repository and nightly policy
tasks.description: Register the filesystem snapshot repository, verify it, and define the nightly snapshot-management policy with explicit retention.

deliverables.title: Cortex bootstrap and smoke proveout
deliverables.summary: Deploy the service, run Cortex bootstrap, perform smoke index and sample knowledge operations, and capture reusable operator evidence for later epics.
outputs: Runtime notes reusable by later epics.

tasks.title: Deploy and confirm health
tasks.description: Deploy the service through the gateway lifecycle and confirm status and cluster health are acceptable for single-node operation.

tasks.title: Run operator smoke index lifecycle
tasks.description: Create, inspect, write to, and delete a temporary cortex-smoke index using the documented operator path.

tasks.title: Run snapshot and restore smoke drill
tasks.description: Trigger or await one snapshot run, then restore into a throwaway target to prove the backup is usable.

tasks.title: Run Cortex bootstrap and sample query flow
tasks.description: Bootstrap the Cortex-owned indexes and aliases, index sample knowledge, and verify ID, provenance, governance, and trace behaviors.
outputs: Bootstrap and query evidence reusable by later epics.

assumptions: OpenSearch continues to be deployed through the standard Moltbox service model.
Cortex embeddings remain externally generated and do not require Neural Search or ML Commons for the MVP.
The dedicated NVMe data path and backup HDD path are available on the target host.
risks: Container posture in moltbox-services may still lag the documented Cortex requirement set.
The exact native CLI wrapper for index administration may require additional control-plane work.
Security bootstrap and service-account provisioning may expose cross-repo ownership gaps.
